name: linDisturbRespWithVariableBitStream
title: linDisturbRespWithVariableBitStream
syntax: dword linDisturbRespWithVariableBitStream(long disturbedFrameId, dword byteIndex, dword bitIndex, byte bitStream[], dword numberOfBits, dword timeoutPrevention);
description: Configures the LIN hardware to disturb the specified response with a variable bit stream.

parameters.name: disturbedFrameID
parameters.description: ID of the bus event to be disturbed.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
